race.comment: Tricky. EXOSTOVA (9) led and was an easy winner here on debut. Outgraded at Doomben after and was tipped out. Has trialled here twice in preparation for this and will be naturally improved. CHAYSE 'N' LEISA (4) resumes at home and has switched from the Les Kelly yard. Might find this a touch short but has the ability and may be more forward this time around. ZOODOO (12) has been racing well without winning. Placed at Kilcoy last time and was only beaten 2.2L at the Sunshine Coast prior. Races forward and deserves another chance. COINCIDE (7) will be fitter and is suited for the longer sprint. His effort at Ipswich first up was good. LITTLE VISTA (1) disappointed at the Sunshine Coast last time but was an easy winner there this grade first-up. Has placed this course/distance and a better effort is likely.
